goal: 实现 cxs dogfood acceptance gate 最小闭环

summary.title: 增加 cxs dogfood 验收门并补齐单字 CJK 召回
summary.what: 新增本机 dogfood eval runner、JSONL golden schema、非阻断 candidate 与阻断 hard 语义，并在文档中明确私有 golden 与 dev-only skill 边界；同时修复 session-level 字段在零 token 单字 CJK 查询下没有 LIKE fallback 的召回不一致。
summary.why: 当前 cxs 检索迭代最缺可信 acceptance gate，而不是继续堆排序逻辑；review 也确认单字 CJK session 字段漏召回是真实小 bug。
summary.user_goal: 实现 cxs dogfood acceptance gate 最小闭环，并在 review 后按如无必要勿增实体原则继续推进。

decisions.chose: Keep private goldens in ignored local JSONL while committing only generic runner/schema code
decisions.rationale: The gate needs real local history cases, but those samples should not ship in public skills or the repository history.
rejected: Put dogfood capture workflow into skill-packages/cxs

decisions.chose: Start with topK session, cwd, matchSource, and context mustContain assertions with hard vs candidate blocking semantics
decisions.rationale: These assertions exercise the retrieval contract without requiring a heavier rubric or scorer before evidence exists.

decisions.chose: Use read-range for message hits and read-page for session-only hits in auto mode
decisions.rationale: Message hits have a numeric seq anchor; session-only hits do not and should not fake one.
rejected: Forge virtual seq values for session-level hits
Always read full pages for every hit

decisions.chose: Reuse existing raw sessions fields with bounded LIKE fallback only when query tokenization yields zero terms
decisions.rationale: The verified bug is narrow; existing fields are enough and no new entity or ranking layer is needed.
rejected: Change tokenizer to index single CJK characters

rejected.alternative: Add resource-level reranker, projection table, or richer event replay now
rejected.reason: The current gap is acceptance evidence plus a narrow recall bug, not a proven need for a larger retrieval layer.

rejected.alternative: Ship dogfood capture workflow in installable cxs or cxsd skill packages
rejected.reason: Dogfood capture is a developer-local curation workflow and may touch private session history.

rejected.alternative: Adjust cwd/title/recency ranking weights from the review alone
rejected.reason: The review described possible tuning but did not provide a dogfood-backed failing pattern.

risks: session-level LIKE fallback 会在单字 CJK 查询时扫描 sessions raw 字段；该路径只在 FTS token 为空时触发，但大索引下仍需留意性能。
dogfood runner 默认使用当前 cxs 索引；如果本机索引未同步，hard golden 可能失败并反映索引新鲜度问题。

anti_patterns.what: Commit private dogfood goldens or eval output into skill-packages/cxs or skill-packages/cxsd
anti_patterns.why: Dogfood samples are developer-local history artifacts; public skills must stay clean and reusable.

anti_patterns.what: Promote candidate dogfood items to hard without explicit user-triggered curation
anti_patterns.why: Hard goldens become an acceptance gate and should only encode verified durable expectations.

anti_patterns.what: Use the single-character CJK fallback as a reason to add a new projection/entity layer
anti_patterns.why: The verified bug is narrow and is solved by querying existing raw session fields; extra entities would violate the current minimal retrieval boundary.

followups: 用 dev-only cxs-dogfood skill 手动策展真实本机 goldens 后运行 npm run eval:dogfood -- <goldens.local.jsonl>。
继续观察 session-level 字段召回是否引入排序噪音，再决定是否需要 query profile 分权或更重 reranker。
本地 main 当前与 origin/main 分叉；seal 后再选择 merge/rebase 最新 main，避免 seal 覆盖无关远端 commit。

architectural_claims: cxs retrieval quality should advance through explicit local acceptance gates before heavier ranking or projection work.
Dogfood goldens are local developer evaluation data; the repository stores only generic runner/schema code.
Session-level recall remains based on existing sessions_fts and raw sessions fields, not virtual messages or new projection entities.
behavioral_changes: Adds npm run eval:dogfood for local JSONL golden evaluation with scorecard artifacts under ignored data/cxs-dogfood-eval.
Hard dogfood failures set a non-zero exit code while candidate failures are reported but nonblocking.
Single-character CJK queries that tokenize to zero terms can now match session title, summary, compact, and reasoning summary fields through bounded LIKE fallback.
security_implications: Dogfood artifacts remain under ignored data paths and should not be committed because they may contain private local session history.
migration_notes: No database migration required; existing sessions and sessions_fts tables are reused.
